creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
amdmi3      2009-08-04 15:13:58 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    multimedia           Makefile 
  Added files:
    multimedia/flvmeta   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  FLVmeta is a metadata injector for Adobe Flash Video files
  (FLV). It is able to inject all known metadata tags into the
  onMetaData event, as well as insert an onLastSecond event.
  
  WWW:    http://code.google.com/p/flvmeta/
  
  PR:             137340
  Submitted by:   Earl Gay <earl@eeg3.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.329     +1 -0      ports/multimedia/Makefile
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/multimedia/flvmeta/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/multimedia/flvmeta/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/multimedia/flvmeta/pkg-descr (new)
